message:
feat(fsqlite-types): add record format types and expand core type definitions

- lib.rs: add ~179 lines of new type definitions including BTreePageType
  enum for merge-safety classification, opcode types for the VDBE
  instruction set (Opcode, VdbeOp, P4), and related re-exports
- record.rs: add ~88 lines implementing the SQLite record format header
  parser and serial-type decoder for reading cell payloads from btree
  leaf pages

These foundational types are consumed by fsqlite-mvcc (lifecycle merge
policy), fsqlite-vdbe (program builder), and fsqlite-btree (cell parsing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
